nasb.text: and constant friction between men of depraved mind and deprived of the truth, who suppose that godliness is a means of gain.

esv.text: and constant friction among people who are depraved in mind and deprived of the truth, imagining that godliness is a means of gain.

cnv.text: 就和那些心術敗壞，喪失真理的人不斷地爭吵。他們視敬虔為得利的門路。

ccb.text: 使那些思想败坏、失去真理的人争论不休，甚至把敬虔当作生财之道。

csbs.text: 他在那些理性败坏、丧失真理、以为敬神是得利之道的人中，引发无休止的争吵。
